patch.value: Embed and parse metadata so fields survive markdown round-trip.

author: codex

patch.value: Delivered full field round-trip (priority/tags/deadline/status) via the new todotxt format, which is genuinely lossless (verified: (A)->prio0, +project->tags, due:->deadline, x->closed survive import->re-export). Deliberately did NOT embed extra metadata into DEFAULT markdown checkboxes: the hard constraint requires default markdown export to stay byte-identical, and registerItemFields custom fields have no pm create/update setter (SDK issue #97), so markdown stays the lightweight title+type+id format. assignee/sprint surface in export via --group-by sprint/type rather than inline. Confirmed pm create supports --deadline/--assignee/--sprint and list-all --json returns them.

message: Delivered full field round-trip (priority/tags/deadline/status) via the new todotxt format, which is genuinely lossless (verified: (A)->prio0, +project->tags, due:->deadline, x->closed survive import->re-export). Deliberately did NOT embed extra metadata into DEFAULT markdown checkboxes: the hard constraint requires default markdown export to stay byte-identical, and registerItemFields custom fields have no pm create/update setter (SDK issue #97), so markdown stays the lightweight title+type+id format. assignee/sprint surface in export via --group-by sprint/type rather than inline. Confirmed pm create supports --deadline/--assignee/--sprint and list-all --json returns them.
